pairs.quote: We're going net zero by 2050. We'll cut our oil and gas production by 40% by 2030.
pairs.reality: In 2025, BP scrapped the 40% cut, doubled oil and gas spending to $10 billion a year, and slashed its renewables budget.

pairs.quote: By 2030 we'll be carbon negative. By 2050 we'll have removed every ton of carbon Microsoft has ever emitted.
pairs.reality: By 2024, Microsoft's emissions were 29% HIGHER than its 2020 baseline — driven by AI data centers. The science-based-targets group delisted them.

pairs.quote: We'll halve our use of new plastic by 2025. All our packaging will be reusable, recyclable, or compostable.
pairs.reality: In 2024 Unilever quietly dropped the 2025 target. The new CEO called the softer goal 'unashamedly realistic.'

pairs.quote: We'll be climate-neutral by 2050. We'll cut our emissions by 25% before 2030.
pairs.reality: BASF lobbies the EU to weaken climate rules while expanding fossil-heavy operations in China. The 2030 target ignores most of their actual footprint (their supply chain).

pairs.quote: We'll be carbon-neutral by 2050, in line with the 1.5°C Paris target.
pairs.reality: VW lobbies the EU to delay the 2035 combustion engine ban. Gas cars still drive most of VW's revenue and profit. Dieselgate evidence keeps surfacing.
